featured.title: ML-based DoS Detection for EV Charging Infrastructure
featured.problem: DoS risk in EV charging networks.
featured.action: Built an ML-based intrusion detection approach for EVCS traffic.
featured.impact: Strengthened detection readiness for connected infrastructure.

featured.title: Enterprise Risk & Threat Analysis (Internship)
featured.problem: Limited visibility into security maturity and risk exposure.
featured.action: Mapped findings to NIST risk categories and incident patterns.
featured.impact: Delivered prioritized remediation guidance tied to business impact.

featured.title: HL7 -> FHIR Data Integration for Clinical Systems
featured.problem: Interoperability gaps across clinical data systems.
featured.action: Validated and mapped HL7 messages into FHIR resources.
featured.impact: Improved deployment-ready data exchange and compliance.
